summary: School Intelligence drawer CONTENT REFINEMENT verified. All 13 requirements PASS. Human narrative replaces generic text, timing signal added, correct CTA logic, engagement section hidden when no signals, 'No coach engagement yet' data quality label (not 'Needs more data'), fit heading appears. No duplicate 'no activity' text.
critical_code_review_comments: buildNarrative(): Returns human-readable context-aware narratives - 'No coach engagement yet. This is a strong-fit school, but interest has not been activated.'
Timing signal format correct: 'Best time to act: Now' via si-timing data-testid
Action line direct: 'Send your first message and personalize it with something specific about this program.'
CTA logic correct: hasOutreach=false → primary='Send First Email' + secondary='Generate Message', hasOutreach=true → 'Follow Up' + 'Generate Follow-up'
Engagement section (si-engagement-status) correctly hidden when signalDetails.length === 0
dataQualityLabel() returns 'No coach engagement yet' NOT 'Needs more data (No coach engagement yet)'
fitHeading() returns 'Why this is a strong fit:' for Strong Fit label
No duplicate 'No activity' messaging - engagement section not rendered when no signals
seed_data_creation: Used existing UCLA (85095202-8b95-4cb2-9390-3275d7840a3d, score 75, no engagement) and Stanford (e02f08c6-7c47-430a-aa8d-787a6fbeae00, score 68)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Intelligence Panel content refinement complete. Key data-testid selectors: si-recommended-strategy, si-strategy-explanation (narrative body), si-timing (Best time to act: X), si-strategy-action, si-primary-cta, si-secondary-cta, si-engagement-status (only visible when coach signals exist), si-data-quality, si-fit-heading, si-match-score, si-fit-label, si-breakdown-toggle. Engagement section conditionally renders based on signalDetails.length > 0.
